Hi, I am

Yash Likhar

DevOps Engineer

Building highly scalable CI/CD infrastructure and cloud-native solutions.

Get In Touch LinkedIn Blog
Profile Picture

Professional Summary

DevOps Engineer with 2+ years of experience building highly scalable CI/CD infrastructure and cloud-native solutions. Proven track record of improving deployment velocity by 2x, reducing system downtime by 40%, and achieving 99.9% service availability. Expertise in containerization, orchestration, monitoring, and automation across multi-cloud environments. Strong background in full-stack development with production-level system design experience.

Experience

DevOps Engineer

Jio Platforms Limited (JPL) | Bengaluru, India Jan 2024 — Present
  • Architected CI/CD pipelines (Jenkins, Azure DevOps, SonarQube) and automated infrastructure with Ansible and Bash/Python, reducing deployment effort by 70% and doubling release frequency.
  • Containerized 15+ monolithic applications into Docker and orchestrated via Kubernetes, improving overall scalability by 50% and reducing resource costs by 30%.
  • Implemented a comprehensive Prometheus, Grafana, and ELK observability stack, enabling real-time monitoring of 200+ microservices with zero critical blind spots over 12+ months.
  • Executed zero-downtime upgrades for critical production services serving millions of users, consistently achieving and maintaining a 99.9% uptime SLA.
  • Spearheaded root cause analysis and advanced debugging for Azure DevOps and critical infrastructure issues, successfully reducing Mean Time To Recovery (MTTR) by 40%.

Key Achievements

  • Improved deployment velocity by 2x while reducing deployment-related incidents to zero.
  • Achieved 99.9% service availability across production environments serving millions.
  • Reduced operational costs by 30% through container optimization.
  • Maintained 12-month streak with zero critical monitoring blind spots across 200+ microservices.
